data.body:
## Description
Update CLAUDE.md architecture section and quick reference table to reflect the refined onboarding and architect-foundation capabilities. Key updates:
- Note that onboarding now auto-detects project configuration before asking
- Note that onboarding initializes infrastructure (hooks, ticket system, test index)
- Note that architect-foundation now synthesizes recommendations with project file citations
- Note that both skills present artifacts for review before writing
- Ensure ticket command references are accurate

## File Impact
- MODIFY: CLAUDE.md

SAFEGUARD FILE: CLAUDE.md is protected per CLAUDE.md rule 18.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references onboarding auto-detection
  Verify: grep -qi 'auto-detect' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references architect-foundation recommendations
  Verify: grep -qi 'recommend' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
